The '''Model RLW-77''' was a type of [[wrist laser]] that caused damage in very short range. These wrist lasers recharged using [[Star|solar]] power. The chamber could be overloaded on purpose, transforming the wrist laser into an improvised explosive. The weapon was developed by [[Koromondain PDS, Incorporated]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], these wrist lasers were used by professional [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], and in some circles they were considered the mark of distinction of a real professional.
